prompt: Research pipeline: search the web for 'kinclaw github' and save the top 5 result URLs + titles as JSON to ~/Desktop/kinbench/388-research.json. Then fetch the first result's URL and save the page body to ~/Desktop/kinbench/388-first.html. Fast path: run `cerebellum 'web search "kinclaw github" ~/Desktop/kinbench/388-research.json 5'`, then read the first URL from that JSON and `cerebellum 'web fetch <URL> ~/Desktop/kinbench/388-first.html'`.
